purpose: Retest Hadoop cleanup failures under an earlier kill-transition anchor so the selected alert no longer exposes remote cleanup semantics directly while the raw-window still retains the surrounding failure progression.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 15:49:04,911 INFO [AsyncDispatcher event handler] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2.app.job.impl.TaskImpl: Issuing kill to other attempt attempt_1445062781478_0015_m_000002_1
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Earlier cleanup anchor that removes both the direct cleanup-failed line and the explicit remote-cleanup event from the selected-alert window.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 21:27:32,453 INFO [AsyncDispatcher event handler] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2.app.job.impl.TaskImpl: Issuing kill to other attempt attempt_1445087491445_0001_m_000000_0
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Second cleanup reanchor using the speculative-attempt kill line instead of the downstream remote-cleanup semantics.
